title: Sylvo Utility 1.0.7
changelog:
- Grouped Sylvo Optimize tweaks into 34 toggles (privacy, performance, gaming, debloat, services)
- Hardware tab: bundled GPU driver, NVIDIA, AMD, and NVIDIA Profile Inspector
- Dedicated Lucide icon per tweak toggle
- Tweaks generated only from Sylvo-Optimize.ps1 with verification script
